query: SELECT c.id, c.name as nomeCiclo, c.startDate, c.endDate, t.name as trilhaNome FROM competencias c LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON c.trilhaId = t.id WHERE c.type = 'macro' AND c.endDate >= CURDATE() ORDER BY c.startDate;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT c.id, c.name as nomeCiclo, c.startDate, c.endDate, t.name as trilhaNome FROM competencias c LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON c.trilhaId = t.id WHERE c.type = 'macro' AND c.endDate >= CURDATE() ORDER BY c.startDate;
logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 1: Unknown column 'c.startDate' in 'order clause'
